tagline: Custom Design and Construction of Pools, Spas, and Fountains

hero.headline: 30 Years Building Dream Pools
hero.sub_headline: From custom pools and spas to stunning water features, Ocean Springs Tech has been the Coachella Valley's trusted builder since 1996. Ranked in the top 8% of all California contractors.

services.headline: Complete Pool & Outdoor Solutions
services.subtitle: From new construction to renovation, maintenance to hardscaping -- one team handles it all.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Construction
cards.description: Custom-designed swimming pools and spas built from concept to completion. We craft stunning aquatic features for homes, hotels, and resorts across the Coachella Valley.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Breathe new life into aging pools with replastering, retiling, deck resurfacing, and full modernization. We transform outdated pools into backyard showpieces.

cards.title: Maintenance Programs
cards.description: Keep your pool crystal-clear year-round with our comprehensive maintenance plans. Regular cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment inspections you can count on.

cards.title: Water Features & Fountains
cards.description: Custom waterfalls, fountains, and decorative water features that add beauty and tranquility to any residential or commercial outdoor space.

cards.title: Equipment & Repairs
cards.description: Expert repair and installation of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems. We keep your pool equipment running at peak efficiency.

cards.title: Concrete & Decking
cards.description: Professional pool decks, pavers, driveways, and hardscape solutions that complement your pool area and complete your outdoor living vision.

steps.title: Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us your vision. We visit your property, discuss your goals, and provide a detailed estimate -- all at no cost.

steps.title: Custom Design & Build
steps.description: Our team designs your project to spec and builds it with precision, keeping you informed at every stage from permit to final finish.

steps.title: Enjoy & Maintain
steps.description: Dive into your new oasis! We offer ongoing maintenance plans so your investment stays beautiful for decades to come.

about.label: About Ocean Springs Tech
about.headline: Coachella Valley's Pool Builder Since 1996
about.description: Founded by Armando Rodriguez after years of hands-on training at a premier Coachella Valley resort, Ocean Springs Tech has grown into the region's go-to pool builder. We handle everything from custom pool construction and renovation to fountains, water features, and complete backyard transformations. Our client list includes homeowners, hotels, resorts, and HOA communities -- and our BuildZoom score of 105 puts us in the top 8% of over 336,000 licensed California contractors. When you choose us, you get 30 years of expertise, an A+ BBB rating, and a team that treats every project like their own backyard.

features.title: One-Stop Pool Solution
features.description: From construction to maintenance, equipment to hardscaping -- we handle every aspect of your pool and backyard.

features.title: Residential & Commercial
features.description: We serve homeowners, hotels, resorts, HOAs, and communities across the entire Coachella Valley.

features.title: Resort-Trained Expertise
features.description: Owner Armando Rodriguez trained at a premier Coachella Valley resort before founding Ocean Springs Tech in 1996.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique, so we provide detailed, upfront estimates after a free on-site consultation. No hidden fees, no change-order games.

guarantee.headline: Our Promise to You
guarantee.description: We stand behind every project with our quality guarantee. If something is not right, we make it right -- period. With an A+ BBB rating, two active California licenses, and full bonding and insurance, your investment is protected from start to finish.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool build typically take?
faqs.answer: Most residential pool projects take 8 to 12 weeks from permit to completion, depending on design complexity and site conditions. We keep you updated at every stage so there are no surprises.

faqs.question: Do you work on commercial properties too?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We serve hotels, resorts, spas, and HOA communities throughout the Coachella Valley. Our team at Silversands alone maintains 15 community pools.

faqs.question: Are you licensed, bonded, and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold two active California contractor licenses (#1053509 and #920435), carry a $15,000 bond through Old Republic Surety, and maintain workers' compensation insurance through Insurance Company of The West.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Greater Coachella Valley including Desert Hot Springs, Palm Springs, Palm Desert, Cathedral City, Rancho Mirage, Indian Wells, La Quinta, Indio, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: Can you remodel my existing pool instead of building new?
faqs.answer: Definitely. We specialize in pool renovations including replastering, retiling, deck resurfacing, equipment upgrades, and adding new water features to transform your current pool.

testimonials.name: Jeffrey W.
testimonials.text: Ocean Springs Tech did a fantastic job renovating my pool and spa waterfall, and decking. The results exceeded my expectations.

testimonials.name: Lisa M.
testimonials.text: A fabulous rehab of our pool, spa and pool deck that had severely deteriorated. The team was professional and thorough throughout the entire process.

testimonials.name: Silversands Community
testimonials.text: Ocean Springs maintains 15 pools in our community and is exceptionally responsible in ensuring all pools are well maintained. Highly recommend.

contact.headline: Let's Build Your Dream Pool
contact.subtitle: Call us, email us, or fill out the form below. We respond within 4 hours on average.
benefits: 100% response rate -- we always get back to you
Serving the Coachella Valley for 30+ years
